title: Cristina Méndez / Xstinamendez Orbology Videos
about: Cristina Méndez Orbology Videos or the Mind Control Latina refers to a series of viral videos by content creator Cristina Méndez, also known as TikToker @xstinamendez, in which she gives lessons on a fictional religion or movement known as "orbology," based around a mysterious artifact called "the orb." The videos have been compared to a form of hypnosis, with Méndez repeating phrases, including a high-pitched "yeah" and the phrase "mi look," and dancing in a hypnotic manner. Méndez started posting the videos in late December 2025, and they garnered virality on TikTok and X / Twitter over the following weeks leading into early 2026, inspiring reactions.
origin:
On December 24th, 2025, actress and content creator Cristina Méndez posted a video on TikTok[1] and X[2] (@xstinamendez) in which she gives her first lesson in "orbology," garnering over 250,000 views on the former and 49,000 views on the latter in two weeks.

In the video, she says that you don't choose "the orb," but that it chooses you. She claims that now that it has chosen you, you might feel like you're being observed and you might have an undying hunger for sandwiches.
